title: Opendoor Q3 2025 Earnings Call Highlights
text: Opendoor Technologies Inc (OPEN) Q3 2025 Earnings Call Highlights. Opendoor reported Q3 2025 results with revenue of $915 million and continued progress on its Opendoor 2.0 strategic transformation. The company acquired 1,169 homes during the quarter, reflecting its focus on growing acquisition velocity. Key highlights included meaningful reduction in operating expenses, with management targeting 20% reduction in operating expenses year-over-year by 2026. The company emphasized its AI-first approach, which has enabled dramatic improvements in operational efficiency including reducing home assessment time from nearly a day to 10 minutes. Strategic innovations included launching over a dozen new initiatives, with CEO Kasra Nejatian characterizing the company as refounding itself as a software-driven platform.
